channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: 鸭哥这条对 AI 分析的在理，很多 Codex 的黑话就是英文直译成中文带来的翻译腔👍
item.author: @dotey

item.title: 这篇关于 Harness 工程的科普文章非常非常好 今天的软件工程实际已经进入了 Harness 工程阶段，复杂度其实一点都不低，而且最重要的事情是要意识到它还是一个动态过程。 模型在不断变强不断内化...
item.description:
这篇关于 Harness 工程的科普文章非常非常好 今天的软件工程实际已经进入了 Harness 工程阶段，复杂度其实一点都不低，而且最重要的事情是要意识到它还是一个动态过程。 模型在不断变强不断内化 Harness 工程需要围绕更好的模型做新的 Harness 这个过程其实不应该以终局思维来看 就像摩尔定律一下，我们获得了更好的芯片，并用它来开发下一代芯片 大模型和 Harness 是真正的左脚踩右脚，不断变强的整体 作为工程师，只要你是在做最前沿的 Harness 永远也无需担心会被模型取代 btw，欢迎对此理解深刻的工程师加入 ColaOS 构建其 Harness k@marswave.ai
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 189
item.author: @oran_ge

item.title: Since Anthropic publish their system prompts we can generate a diff between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7 ...
item.author: @simonw

item.title: good to know that a trillion dollars’ investment scaling has thoroughly solved the challenges of com...
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title:
A quick update for everyone following this:
I've been asking for help since March 9th about my Cla...
item.description:
A quick update for everyone following this:
I've been asking for help since March 9th about my ClawHub skill slugs being maliciously hijacked. To be clear, this isn't just name-squatting—someone is forking my open-source code and publishing it directly.
Despite repeated promises that it will be resolved, there has been absolutely zero progress.
I am now seriously considering no longer publishing my skills to ClawHub.
--- @dotey | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 1577
item.author: @dotey

item.title: if you showed a primitive canibalistic tribe codex computer use they wouldn’t have cared and would h...
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
Set up your trade without losing sight of the market.
Tap the minimize button on the K-line chart ...
item.description:
Set up your trade without losing sight of the market.
Tap the minimize button on the K-line chart to open a floating chart.
Even better, you can browse social media or other apps while keeping your chart in view.
Try now 👉 https://t.co/dTCZMhNksw https://t.co/Dm1MReFBOf
--- @binance | ❤️ 36 | 🔁 4 | 💬 16 | 👁 4572
item.author: @binance

item.title: And just like that Hungarians yet again save the Western Civilization.
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
Is a 92% “honest”* AI really good enough?
Or a disaster waiting to happen?
—- *”honest” is itself ...
item.description:
Is a 92% “honest”* AI really good enough?
Or a disaster waiting to happen?
—- *”honest” is itself a misleading anthropomorphization of the kind Anthropic loves to promote. “Accurate” would be more accurate. https://t.co/NMnjGEqf41
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 11 | 🔁 0 | 💬 6 | 👁 607
item.author: @GaryMarcus
